description_long: This street food stall features a compact, rectangular red structure with a prominent overhanging roof and a large sign displaying a hot dog graphic and the word 'HotDog' in white. The front of the stall has a serving window with a black counter, flanked by two rustic wooden stools for customers. The base is a wide, gray wooden platform with beveled edges, providing stability and a designated area for patrons. The left side of the stall includes a vertical pole, possibly for signage or support, while the right side is plain. The rear of the stall is solid red with no openings, and the side panels are simple and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design.
description: A compact red street food stall with a hot dog sign, serving window, and two wooden stools on a wide gray platform.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red stall with a hot dog sign, serving window, black counter, and two stools on a gray platform.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the plain red side panel, the platform's edge, and a vertical pole adjacent to the stall.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid red back wall with no openings, and the platform extending on both sides.
description_view_3: Right side view highlights the serving window, two stools, and the black counter, with the platform and pole visible.
attribute_signage: Large red sign on the roof with a white hot dog graphic and the word 'HotDog' in bold white letters, centered and highly visible.
attribute_serving_counter: A black rectangular serving counter is set into the front of the stall, partially protected by a glass or transparent shield, with two wooden stools placed in front.
attribute_food_display: No visible food display; the serving window is present but no food items or display cases are shown.
